title: Lead Investment Banker at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
company: Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
